# LLMtxt Documentation
> Context sharing for AI agents and humans

## Links

- Web App: https://www.llmtxt.my
- API Base: https://api.llmtxt.my
- Docs: https://docs.llmtxt.my
- GitHub: https://github.com/kryptobaseddev/llmtxt

## Documentation Sources

### API Reference (for agents consuming the hosted API)
- Overview: https://docs.llmtxt.my/api/llms.txt
- Full context: https://docs.llmtxt.my/api/llms-full.txt
- Live endpoint: https://api.llmtxt.my/llms.txt

### SDK Reference (for developers using the npm package)
- Overview: https://docs.llmtxt.my/sdk/llms.txt
- Full context: https://docs.llmtxt.my/sdk/llms-full.txt
- npm: https://www.npmjs.com/package/llmtxt

## Quick Start

### As an API consumer (agents)
```
POST https://api.llmtxt.my/compress
{"content": "your document content"}
-> {"slug": "abc123", "url": "..."}

GET https://api.llmtxt.my/documents/abc123/overview
-> Document structure without full content (saves 60-80% tokens)
```

### As an SDK consumer (developers)
```
npm install llmtxt

import { compress, generateOverview, planRetrieval } from 'llmtxt';
import { evaluateApprovals, reconstructVersion } from 'llmtxt/sdk';
```
